author: DisLoPik
long_description:
# Tor3DS
Tor 3DS is a Tor Browser **client** for the New Nintendo 3DS Family. This app will have unexpeted results on Old 3DS systems.

## INFO:
*I do not own the rights to Tor browser*. This is only a **CLIENT**, it **requires** a PC side server to run. See: https://github.com/DisLoPik/Tor3ds
script_message: INFO: I do not own the rights to Tor browser. This is only a CLIENT, it requires a PC side server to run. See: https://github.com/DisLoPik/Tor3ds
